description.en: Deposit EGLD or tokens into the multi-sig wallet. Anyone can deposit funds, and they can later be transferred via proposals.

inputs.description: The amount of EGLD or ESDT tokens to deposit.

messages.success: Funds deposited successfully to the MultiSig wallet.
